untranslatable_reason: The signal depends on lagged lookback signals ('longs' and 'shorts') with h-period backshift logic that are not defined in the source text and cannot be reconstructed from allowed indicators. The original code uses custom boolean vectors (longs, shorts) that require strategy-specific indicator definitions not provided. Parameters lookback_period, threshold, and half_life are marked AUTHOR_SILENT. Without explicit definitions of these upstream signals, the exact entry/exit conditions cannot be translated.
translation_notes: Signal is an interday momentum strategy with fixed hold period. The core entry logic (lagged long/short signals after h-period lookback) cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators without the underlying signal definitions. A reversal-based placeholder using price momentum (close vs prev_close) has been provided as a fallback, but this does not capture the intended strategy. hold_days_max set to 5 as a reasonable estimate pending clarification of the actual holddays parameter.
